title: Cloud Application Architectural Patterns & Security Implications
description: A flowchart illustrating common cloud application architecture patterns, their core components, and the associated security considerations for each.
relationships: Client requests are routed through an API Gateway which authenticates via the IdP and routes to specific Microservices
Microservices can be scaled by a Load Balancer and use Caches for performance
Serverless Functions are event-driven and interact with Databases and Object Storage
All components communicate securely over TLS and rely on the IdP for authentication and authorization
